prerequisites: A GlassFlow account (sign up at app.glassflow.dev).
A GlassFlow pipeline to publish to, created from the GlassFlow web app or via the GlassFlow Python SDK. Each pipeline has its own pipeline ID.
The pipeline's pipeline_id, which identifies the GlassFlow pipeline that will receive synced records.
The pipeline's pipeline_access_token, used to authenticate publishing of events into that pipeline.

authMethods.name: Pipeline access token
authMethods.summary: GlassFlow authenticates writes to a pipeline with a pipeline access token. The connector takes this as the pipeline_access_token secret field and pairs it with the pipeline_id to publish events to the target pipeline (the same pipeline_id and pipeline_access_token pair passed to the GlassFlow Python SDK's pipeline_client to publish). There is no OAuth or username/password method for this connector.

setupSteps.title: Create a GlassFlow account
setupSteps.body: Sign up for a GlassFlow account at app.glassflow.dev if you do not already have one.

setupSteps.title: Create the target pipeline
setupSteps.body: Create a GlassFlow pipeline that will receive the synced data, either through the GlassFlow web app or with the GlassFlow Python SDK (client.create_pipeline). After creation, note the pipeline's id, which you will use as pipeline_id.

setupSteps.title: Get the pipeline access token
setupSteps.body: Obtain the access token for that pipeline from GlassFlow. This token authorizes publishing events into the pipeline and is supplied to the connector as pipeline_access_token.

setupSteps.title: Configure the GlassFlow destination
setupSteps.body: In the connector configuration, set pipeline_id to your GlassFlow pipeline's ID and pipeline_access_token to that pipeline's access token. Both fields are required; the connector uses them to publish records to the pipeline.

sources.title: GlassFlow getting-started guide (account, pipeline creation, pipeline.id)
GlassFlow Python SDK README (pipeline_client with pipeline_id and pipeline_access_token to publish)
